summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of PL Jovem Quiz application. All backend APIs (8/8) and frontend features working correctly. Successfully tested registration, quiz flow, scoring system, admin dashboard, and responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend API: Participant registration with field validation
Backend API: Duplicate email validation (400 status)
Backend API: Quiz questions endpoint (10 questions, 4 options, no answers revealed)
Backend API: Quiz submission and scoring (1000 points for perfect score)
Backend API: Quiz completion status tracking
Backend API: Admin login (admin/admin123 credentials)
Backend API: Admin participants list with statistics
Backend API: Form field validation (phone, CEP formats)
Frontend UI: Landing page with logo, title, feature cards, start button
Frontend UI: Registration form with all required fields and validation
Frontend UI: Quiz flow with 10 questions, progress bar, navigation
Frontend UI: Admin login with credential validation
Frontend UI: Admin dashboard with statistics (7 participants, 700 avg, 1000 max)
Frontend UI: Participant table showing registration data
Frontend UI: Responsive design (desktop, tablet, mobile views)
Integration: Registration → Quiz flow working
Integration: Quiz submission → Score calculation working
Integration: Admin dashboard displaying real participant data
Integration: Frontend-backend communication via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
Security: Quiz questions don't reveal correct answers to client
